plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-096 RP01.P02.M04.S07-RP01.P02.M06.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-096 core domain workflow binding pack

notes: CP00-096 closes a generated Risk B 40-unit pack without splitting into one-unit subphase closeouts.
Implementation remains synthetic-only and does not evaluate runtime permission, write audit ledger entries, create database rows, or mutate product state.
Two Claude CLI attempts were invalid and not counted; exactly one valid staged-diff pack review is recorded.
